overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a high-speed vehicle chase through a futuristic neon-lit city, transitioning to a first-person walking perspective along a covered sidewalk. The environment features towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and atmospheric haze with dominant red and blue artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway tunnel with red neon lighting

events.description: police car with flashing red and blue lights passes on the left side
vehicle maneuvers to the right lane to overtake slower traffic

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway tunnel following a dark SUV at high speed

notable_agents.action: police car with sirens overtaking on the left
dark SUV driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure forming a tunnel-like enclosure with grid ceiling
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the concrete walls
tall concrete wall with weathered texture and graffiti
elevated highway bridge visible through the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a covered urban highway tunnel bathed in red neon light. The camera follows a dark SUV closely while a police car with flashing lights overtakes on the left. The enclosed space features concrete walls with graffiti and horizontal neon strips, creating a claustrophobic cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: exits the covered tunnel into open highway with visible sky and surrounding skyscrapers
weaves through moderate traffic, passing a white sedan with red decals

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on elevated highway, overtaking slower vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan with red decals driving ahead and changing lanes
yellow sports car accelerating in the right lane

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with directional signage
tall modern glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows
electronic highway signs with glowing text

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered tunnel, the scene opens onto an elevated highway with a massive glass skyscraper dominating the center view. The camera weaves through moderate traffic, passing a white sedan and falling in behind a yellow sports car. The environment transitions from enclosed red neon to open dusk lighting with visible overpasses and digital signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with blue-lit road sections and digital billboards

events.description: road surface transitions to illuminated blue sections under the overpass
approaches and enters busy intersection with multiple vehicles merging

agents.ego_description: driving through illuminated intersection with heavy futuristic signage and blue road lighting

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car maintaining position in the left lane
silver sedan slowing down ahead at the intersection

entered.detail: overhead gantry with multiple digital direction signs and glowing arrows
road surface with embedded blue lighting creating glowing lane markings
cluster of high-rise buildings with neon accents and industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a major intersection featuring striking blue illuminated road sections and massive digital overhead signage. The glass skyscraper shifts to the left as the camera approaches a dense cluster of futuristic buildings on the right. Traffic density increases with multiple vehicles navigating the glowing blue lanes under the expansive overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian sidewalk under highway overpass with planters

events.description: transition from vehicle driving to first-person walking perspective on the sidewalk
moves from road level to sidewalk, passing under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the highway, observing the urban environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian walkway with concrete paving slabs
large concrete planters containing mature trees with green foliage
massive concrete support columns for the overhead highway structure
concrete benches integrated with the planter boxes

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically from high-speed driving to a leisurely walk along a covered sidewalk. The camera moves past concrete planters with mature trees and benches, while the glass skyscraper now appears on the right. A pedestrian approaches from the distance as the camera continues under the massive highway overpass, with the blue-lit road now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed vehicular chase through a claustrophobic tunnel to a slow, pedestrian walk along a futuristic city sidewalk. It begins with a rapid drive through a covered urban highway bathed in red neon light, closely following a dark SUV as a police car with flashing lights streaks past. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the enclosed red glow gives way to open dusk lighting and a massive glass skyscraper that dominates the horizon while the vehicle weaves through traffic. The scene then shifts into a major intersection where the road transforms into striking blue illuminated lanes beneath expansive overpasses and towering digital signage. Finally, the perspective transitions from the speed of the road to a leisurely pace on a covered sidewalk, moving past concrete planters and benches with the blue-lit highway now visible to the right.
